panels.description: Nodes reporting Ready=false. Start with node status before chasing workload symptoms.
panels.title: Nodes Not Ready

panels.description: Firing Grafana-managed warning and critical alerts when the ALERTS metric is present.
panels.title: Alerts Firing

panels.description: Gateway API programming, route acceptance, and reference-resolution failures.

targets.expr: (sum(gatewayapi_gateway_status_condition{type="Programmed"} == bool 0) OR vector(0)) + (sum(gatewayapi_httproute_parent_accepted == bool 0) OR vector(0)) + (sum(gatewayapi_tlsroute_parent_accepted == bool 0) OR vector(0)) + (sum(gatewayapi_httproute_parent_resolved_refs == bool 0) OR vector(0)) + (sum(gatewayapi_tlsroute_parent_resolved_refs == bool 0) OR vector(0))

panels.title: Gateway Issues

panels.description: Mimir, Loki, Grafana, and Alloy scrape targets currently reporting up=0.
panels.title: Observability Targets Down

panels.description: Pods currently Pending or Failed, excluding retained synthetic-smoke job history in the synthetics namespace.

targets.expr: sum(max by (namespace, pod, phase) ((kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Pending"} or (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Failed"} unless (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Failed",namespace="synthetics",pod=~"synthetic-smoke-.+"} or kube_pod_status_phase{exported_namespace="synthetics",phase="Failed",pod=~"synthetic-smoke-.+"}))) > bool 0)) OR vector(0)

panels.title: Failed Or Pending Pods

panels.description: Containers with at least one restart in the last hour.

targets.expr: sum(max by (namespace, pod, container) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[1h]) > bool 0)) OR vector(0)

panels.title: Recent Restarts

panels.description: Current high-signal Kubernetes problems. Retained synthetic-smoke job history in the synthetics namespace is excluded from failed pod phase rows.

targets.expr: max by (namespace, pod, container, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason{reason!="ContainerCreating"} > bool 0) OR max by (namespace, pod, container, reason) (kube_pod_container_status_waiting{reason!="ContainerCreating"} > bool 0)

max by (namespace, pod, phase) ((kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Unknown"} or (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Failed"} unless (kube_pod_status_phase{phase="Failed",namespace="synthetics",pod=~"synthetic-smoke-.+"} or kube_pod_status_phase{exported_namespace="synthetics",phase="Failed",pod=~"synthetic-smoke-.+"}))) > bool 0)

panels.title: Current Workload Problems

panels.description: Recent warning and error logs from core control, networking, and observability namespaces.
panels.title: Recent Platform Error Logs

panels.description: Active node pressure conditions across memory, disk, and process IDs.
panels.title: Node Pressure

panels.description: PersistentVolumeClaims stuck in Pending state.

targets.expr: sum(max by (namespace, persistentvolumeclaim) (kube_persistentvolumeclaim_status_phase{phase="Pending"} > bool 0)) OR vector(0)

panels.title: PVCs Pending

panels.description: Containers with at least one restart in the last hour.

targets.expr: sum(max by (namespace, pod, container) (increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[1h]) > bool 0)) OR vector(0)

panels.title: Containers Restarted

panels.description: Total Kubernetes nodes known to kube-state-metrics.
panels.title: Total Nodes

panels.description: Node CPU saturation trend, grouped by node_name as exported by node metrics.
panels.title: Node CPU Usage

panels.description: Node memory pressure trend using MemAvailable against MemTotal.
panels.title: Node Memory Usage

panels.description: Flux resources that will not reconcile automatically because suspension is enabled.
panels.title: Resources Suspended

panels.description: Flux resources with Unknown readiness, often dependency waits or stalled status updates.
panels.title: Resources Waiting

panels.description: Recent Flux reconciliation throughput across controllers.
panels.title: Reconciliation Rate

panels.description: Total GitOps-managed Kustomization and HelmRelease resources currently observed.
panels.title: Managed Resources

panels.description: Ready, failed, and unknown Flux resources over the selected time range.
panels.title: Flux Resource Health

panels.description: Flux controller errors and warnings from source, kustomize, helm, and notification controllers.
panels.title: Flux Controller Logs

panels.description: Gateway resources not reporting Programmed=True.
panels.title: Gateways Not Programmed

panels.description: HTTPRoute and TLSRoute parent references not accepted by the Gateway.

targets.expr: (sum(gatewayapi_httproute_parent_accepted == bool 0) OR vector(0)) + (sum(gatewayapi_tlsroute_parent_accepted == bool 0) OR vector(0))

panels.title: Routes Not Accepted

panels.description: Cilium agent scrape targets currently up in kube-system.
panels.title: Cilium Agents Up

panels.description: Certificates with Ready condition not true.
panels.title: Certificates Not Ready

panels.description: Gateway and route conditions over time; nonzero means routing should be inspected.

targets.expr: (sum(gatewayapi_httproute_parent_accepted == bool 0) OR vector(0)) + (sum(gatewayapi_tlsroute_parent_accepted == bool 0) OR vector(0))
(sum(gatewayapi_httproute_parent_resolved_refs == bool 0) OR vector(0)) + (sum(gatewayapi_tlsroute_parent_resolved_refs == bool 0) OR vector(0))

panels.title: Gateway API Condition Problems

panels.description: Recent Cilium and Gateway controller log lines matching common network failure terms.
panels.title: Network And Edge Logs

panels.description: Mimir ingesters currently ACTIVE in the ring.
panels.title: Mimir Ingesters Active

panels.description: Loki scrape targets reporting up=0.
panels.title: Loki Targets Down

panels.description: Alloy desired daemonset pods not ready.
panels.title: Alloy Pods Missing

panels.description: Shortest observed cert-manager certificate lifetime in days.
panels.title: Certificate Minimum Days

panels.description: Down scrape targets grouped by observability namespace and service.

targets.expr: sum by (namespace, service) (up{job="prometheus.scrape.service",namespace=~"grafana|mimir|loki|alloy"} == bool 0) OR on() vector(0)

panels.title: Observability Scrape Failures

panels.description: Loki request 5xx rate. Nonzero values usually point to gateway, read, or write component pressure.
panels.title: Loki Server Errors

panels.description: Missing available replicas for the Authentik server deployment.
panels.title: Authentik Server Missing

panels.description: Pi-hole pods in Running state.
panels.title: Pi-hole Running

panels.description: Jellyfin pods in Running state.
panels.title: Jellyfin Running

panels.description: Synthetic smoke run summary counts by status over the selected range.
panels.title: Smoke Runs

panels.description: Running pod counts for Authentik, Pi-hole, Jellyfin, FoundryVTT, Valheim, Renovate, cloudflared, and synthetics namespaces.

targets.expr: sum by (exported_namespace) (kube_pod_status_phase{exported_namespace=~"authentik|pihole|jellyfin|foundryvtt|valheim|renovate|cloudflare|synthetics",phase="Running"} > bool 0) OR on() vector(0)

panels.title: Activated App Running Pods

panels.description: Application logs matching common failure terms across Authentik, Pi-hole, Jellyfin, FoundryVTT, Valheim, Renovate, cloudflared, and synthetics namespaces.
panels.title: App Error Logs
